purpose: The climax of the chapter; a failed plan leads to an ambush and high-stakes peril.
summary: John Carter attempts to meet the women at the city edge with his thoats, but finds the rendezvous compromised. After hiding his animals, he overhears Thark warriors planning to ambush him and take him to the vaults, while Dejah Thoris is being taken to Tal Hajus.
emotional_arc: Hopeful Action $\rightarrow$ Confusion $\rightarrow$ Terror/Realization of Trap.
production_intent: The sequence establishes a high-stakes transition from an active rescue attempt to a desperate survival situation. The production must manage the shift from wide, mobile movement (thoat travel) to claustrophobic, static tension as John Carter transitions into hiding. Success relies on the interplay between low-light visual atmosphere and precise sound design to convey information that the protagonist (and audience) can only overhear.

storyboard_markdown:
# Scene Contract: CH016_SC006

## Production Intent
The sequence establishes a high-stakes transition from an active rescue attempt to a desperate survival situation. The production must manage the shift from wide, mobile movement (thoat travel) to claustrophobic, static tension as John Carter transitions into hiding. Success relies on the interplay between low-light visual atmosphere and precise sound design to convey information that the protagonist (and audience) can only overhear.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- Thark Warriors
- Thark Chieftain (off-screen/overheard)

## Required Environments
- City outskirts
- a courtyard
- dark alleys near the Jeddak's quarters

## Continuity Constraints
- Nighttime lighting and shadow consistency across locations
- Movement patterns/choreography of the Thark warriors
- Sound design synchronization for overheard dialogue

## Beat List
- BT001: John Carter arrives at the city edge with his thoats, attempting to meet the women.
- BT002: John realizes the rendezvous is compromised and hides his animals.
- BT003: John takes cover and overhears Thark warriors planning an ambush.
- BT004: John learns of the plan to take him to the vaults and Dejah Thoris being taken to Tal Hajus.
- BT005: Realization of the trap sets in, shifting tone to terror.
